meaning: n.[语]语法,有秩序的排列,句子构造,句法
examples: Each computer language has its own syntax and vocabulary.
His grammar and syntax, both in oral and written expression, were much better than the average.
This is a strategy called double syntax.
And I really appreciated the way that the syntax flowed in that particular translation.
Of course, faulty syntax by itself has never been an impediment to successful advertising.
